headline: Dog Learns To Answer The Phone, Now Schedules His Own Vet Appointments
summary: 'He called the vet himself,' his owner said. 'He said 'treat me like royalty.' The vet laughed.
fullBody: Rex learned to answer the phone. He called the vet. 'I need an appointment,' Rex said (via translator). 'Treat me like royalty.' The vet was confused. 'Is this a prank?' the vet asked. 'It's Rex,' Rex said. Rex now has his own medical file. 'He's very proactive,' his owner said. Rex has started a wellness podcast. Episode 1: 'How to Advocate for Yourself.'
